description: Perform an Exploratory Factor Analysis (EFA) on the Big Five Inventory dataset located at /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/BFI25.csv. Include all 25 personality item variables (A1-A5, C1-C5, E1-E5, N1-N5, O1-O5) in the analysis, excluding gender and age. Configure the analysis using minimum residuals extraction, Oblimin rotation, and a fixed number of 5 factors. Ensure the output includes the factor summary and factor correlations. Save the results to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/BFI25_EFA.omv.
